title: Cybersecurity AI: OpenAI vs. Anthropic's new arms race — Apr 15
summary: OpenAI counters Anthropic's recent cybersecurity moves by launching GPT-5.4-Cyber, a specialized model for defenders, escalating the AI arms race in security. Meanwhile, Anthropic and Google are pushing agentic capabilities forward with new tools for autonomous coding and browser-based workflows.
